test.output: All tests passed. Coverage: auth 22.1%, errors 66.7%, output 76.7%, confluence 22.8%, protheus 36.5%

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about skills location: Skills are located in `skills/` directory at repository root (not `.factory/skills/`). Workers should use Glob to discover skill locations rather than assuming a path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: recommendations-mapj worker first tried to read from '.factory/skills/mapj/SKILL.md' which failed, then used Glob to find actual location at 'skills/mapj/SKILL.md'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the skill evaluation methodology (Discovery Layer 40pts, Execution Layer 50pts, Anti-patterns 10pts) as a reusable reference for future skill evaluations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: evaluate-mapj-skills worker established a methodology in .factory/library/skill-evaluation-mapj_cli.md but this is a one-off document, not a reusable reference

rejectedObservations.observation: mapj_cli skills use `metadata.tags` instead of top-level `keywords` field
analysis-worker skill procedure was followed correctly
